title: Run Stage Enumeration v1
description: Canonical enumeration of run stages for Horror.Place sessions, used by run contracts, AI-chat templates, selector patterns, and telemetry.

description_details.OuterThreshold: Initial approach and orientation phase; low DET, high ARR, building uncertainty.
description_details.Locus: Core engagement phase; rising CIC/AOS, metric targets tighten, liminal structures prominent.
description_details.Rupture: Peak intensity phase; high DET/SHCI, safety boundaries tested, director strategies active.
description_details.Fallout: Resolution and reflection phase; ARR high, CDL managed, metrics return toward baseline.
